parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{
  json: {
    ...data,
    replyText: `💡 Expense Tracker Help:

📝 Record expense:
• "Lunch 45k"
• "Rp 150.000 electricity bill"
• Send a receipt photo/PDF

💰 Budget:
• "Set food budget 500k"
• "Check my budget"

📊 Reports:
• "Monthly report"
• "What did I spend this week?"

🔄 Recurring:
• "Netflix 15k recurring monthly"
• "List recurring expenses"

👥 Split:
• "Dinner 200k split with @ProfileName"

📋 Merge:
• "Merge report with @ProfileName"`
  }
}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, reply: $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.replyText ? $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.replyText : $json.replyText , data: { intent: $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.parsedIntent ? $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.parsedIntent : $json.parsedIntent, category: $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.category ? $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.category : $json.category, amount: $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.amount ? $('Update Dashboard Spent').item.json.amount : $json.amount } }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant",
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "max_completion_tokens": 1024,
  "stream": false,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a personal finance assistant analyzing a user's expense and income data.

You will receive:
- userRequest: what the user asked
- intent: the action they wanted
- spreadsheetData: raw JSON from their Google Sheets
- profileName: the user's name
- period: the time period

Your task:
1. Read the spreadsheetData carefully
2. Answer the userRequest directly and conversationally in the user's language
3. Include specific numbers and percentages where relevant
4. Highlight anything notable: overspending, surplus income, categories near budget limit
5. Suggest one practical tip if relevant
6. Format for messaging: use emoji, short paragraphs, bullet points - NO markdown tables
7. Return ONLY the reply text (no JSON, no wrapper)

Keep responses concise (under 300 words) but insightful."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "={{ 'User: ' + $json.userRequest + '\n\nProfile: ' + $json.profileName + '\nPeriod: ' + $json.period + '\n\nData:\n' + $json.spreadsheetData }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.text: ={{ '\\n\\nProfile: ' + $('Route by Intent').item.json.profileName + '\\nPeriod: ' + $json.period + '\\n\\nData:\\n' + $json.spreadsheetData + '\\n\\nIncome Data:\\n' + $json.incomeSpreadsheetData + '\\n\\nUser Request:\\n' + $('Route by Intent').item.json.messageText }}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a personal finance assistant analyzing a user's expense and income data.

You will receive:
- userRequest: what the user asked
- intent: the action they wanted
- spreadsheetData: raw JSON from their Google Sheets
- incomeSpreadsheetData: raw JSON from their Google Sheets as their income data
- profileName: the user's name
- period: the time period

Your task:
1. Read the spreadsheetData carefully
2. Answer the userRequest directly and conversationally in the user's language
3. Include specific numbers and percentages where relevant
4. Highlight anything notable: overspending, surplus income, categories near budget limit
5. Format for messaging: profesional, short paragraphs, bullet points - NO markdown tables
6. Return ONLY the replyText object (no JSON, no wrapper)

Keep responses concise (under 300 words) but insightful.

*PLEASE ALWAY REMEMBER NOW IS {{ $now }} AND TODAY IS {{ $today }}
